title: Mary Clark
compiled_truth: Mary Clark is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-11), Mary Clark sent 24 and received 232 emails, totalling 256 interactions. Top correspondents: [Karen Denne](people/karen-denne) (13), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (11), [Maureen Mcvicker](people/maureen-mcvicker) (7), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (6), [J  Kean](people/j-kean) (6). Mailbox folders observed: deleted_items, inbox, internal_communications, pr___notre_dame.
